teaser: Ten major banks, including Goldman Sachs Group Inc, JPMorgan Chase & Co., and BNP Paribas SA, have agreed to pay a combined $46 million to resolve a long-standing lawsuit. The banks have been accused of conspiring to stifle competition in interest-rate swaps trading.
teaserText: Ten major banks, including Goldman Sachs Group Inc, JPMorgan Chase & Co., and BNP Paribas SA, have agreed to pay a combined $46 million to resolve a long-standing lawsuit. The banks have been accused of conspiring to stifle competition in interest-rate swaps trading.
title: Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, BNP Paribas And Other Big Banks To Pay $46M To Settle Swaps Collusion Case

teaser: Independent presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr., excluded from the first presidential debate featuring Joe Biden and Donald Trump, hosted his own "Real Debate" event, criticizing both opponents and discussing issues like tariffs, inflation, and health, with the debate livestreamed on X by Elon Musk.

title: Elon Musk Says It's 'Worth Watching' As Robert Kennedy Jr Answers Questions On The 'Real Debate'
